fields.summary: YarnClient obtain Delegation Token for Log Aggregation Path

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
There are use cases where Yarn Log Aggregation Path is configured to a FileSystem like S3 or ABFS different from what is configured in fs.defaultFS (HDFS). Log Aggregation fails as the client has token only for fs.defaultFS and not for log aggregation path.

This Jira is to improve YarnClient by obtaining delegation token for log aggregation path and add it to the Credential of Container Launch Context similar to how it does for Timeline Delegation Token.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: The Yarn client should use the UGI who created the Yarn client for obtaining a delegation token for the remote log dir

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A problem which impairs or prevents the functions of the product.
issuetype.name: Bug
